figures.caption: Fig. 1. Left: Example network architecture with an input layer with a single channel, two hidden layers with SSM neurons and an output layer of two channels. Middle: An SSM neuron with time-varying dynamics. Right: Illustration of the proposed basis function expansion for a single time-varying element of the SSM state transition matrix.
Fig. 4. Example sample from the speech-distortion task. The plots show a zoomed-in segment of the 1s speech sequence.
